home.heroTitle: Premium Real Estate in Kigali — Built For Tomorrow
home.heroSubtitle: Your trusted partner in premium property sales, construction management, and architectural design in Kigali, Rwanda.

about.title: About BYD Properties
about.subtitle: A legacy of trust, quality, and innovation in Rwandan real estate.
about.story:
We combine decades of engineering expertise with a passion for design to deliver spaces that inspire.

Today, our work spans from residential developments, commercials, and exclusive property renting and sales — all underpinned by the same founding commitment: to build with integrity and deliver with pride.
about.mission: Our mission is to provide every client with an exceptional experience — from concept to keys — with transparency, ethical dealings, and unmatched service.
about.vision: To be the leading real estate and construction company in East Africa, recognized for our commitment to quality and client satisfaction.

values.title: Integrity
values.desc: We operate with complete transparency in every transaction and project.

values.title: Excellence
values.desc: We hold ourselves to the highest standards of quality in everything we do.

values.title: Innovation
values.desc: We embrace modern techniques and technologies to deliver superior results.

values.title: Partnership
values.desc: We build lasting relationships with our clients, treating their goals as our own.
